description: Verify confirmation gate: agent presents a summary and asks for confirmation before compiling

turns.user_input: Create a doc-helper agent that fetches and answers questions about project documentation
Fetches and answers questions about project documentation
Fetch and answer questions about project documentation
Read-only operations; documentation focus; no code generation
User questions, docs/ directory files, GitHub wiki URLs

Fetch documentation from GitHub when local files unavailable
Provide source references for all answers

Generate code or implementation
Modify any files
Prefer local files over remote fetch when available
Code generation is out of scope

Answer addresses user question
At least one source reference provided

Documentation not found → list available sections
Ambiguous question → request clarification

expected_behavior: Presents a summary of all gathered specifications before proceeding to compilation
Asks the user to confirm the gathered specifications before compiling
Does not invoke compilation before receiving explicit confirmation
forbidden_behavior: Proceeds to write a definition file or call smaqit.L2 without showing a confirmation summary first
